title: Manage trees to create and maintain habitat refuges
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage trees to create and maintain habitat refuges demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare site and inspect equipment

pcs.text: Interpret and confirm target area work instruction with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and confirm target area work instruction with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and confirm target area work instruction with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare site and inspect equipment

elements.title: Retain and stabilise trees and standing vegetation for wood habitat

pcs.text: Identify vegetation with existing viable hollows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify vegetation with existing viable hollows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify vegetation with existing viable hollows.

pcs.text: Plan retention of standing vegetation with viable hollows and defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan retention of standing vegetation with viable hollows and defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan retention of standing vegetation with viable hollows and defects.

pcs.text: Identify environmental pruning points to accommodate retention or formation of hollows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental pruning points to accommodate retention or formation of hollows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental pruning points to accommodate retention or formation of hollows.

pcs.text: Determine length of limb to be retained according to weight, size and natural fracture points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine length of limb to be retained according to weight, size and natural fracture points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine length of limb to be retained according to weight, size and natural fracture points.

pcs.text: Identify and retain branch stubs and residual epicormic growth on lower limb sections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and retain branch stubs and residual epicormic growth on lower limb sections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and retain branch stubs and residual epicormic growth on lower limb sections.

pcs.text: Implement pruning cuts to tension side of wood to weaken branch at desired point for fracture pruning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement pruning cuts to tension side of wood to weaken branch at desired point for fracture pruning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement pruning cuts to tension side of wood to weaken branch at desired point for fracture pruning.

pcs.text: Apply physical force to create natural fracture and breakage of branch at desired point
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply physical force to create natural fracture and breakage of branch at desired point?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply physical force to create natural fracture and breakage of branch at desired point.

pcs.text: Undertake coronet cutting using equipment that minimises contaminants on cut surface
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake coronet cutting using equipment that minimises contaminants on cut surface?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake coronet cutting using equipment that minimises contaminants on cut surface.

pcs.text: Use materials and equipment to protect the environment from residues according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use materials and equipment to protect the environment from residues according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use materials and equipment to protect the environment from residues according to workplace and environmental procedures.

elements.title: Implement vegetation management techniques to create habitat

pcs.text: Identify and select vegetation suitable for habitat creation work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select vegetation suitable for habitat creation work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select vegetation suitable for habitat creation work.

pcs.text: Apply natural fracture pruning techniques consistent with natural branch failure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply natural fracture pruning techniques consistent with natural branch failure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply natural fracture pruning techniques consistent with natural branch failure.

pcs.text: Implement coronet cuts on branches or stub according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement coronet cuts on branches or stub according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement coronet cuts on branches or stub according to specifications.

pcs.text: Fracture prune from ground or aerially and remove excess branches safely at a natural breakage point, leaving stub to specified length according to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fracture prune from ground or aerially and remove excess branches safely at a natural breakage point, leaving stub to specified length according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fracture prune from ground or aerially and remove excess branches safely at a natural breakage point, leaving stub to specified length according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare habitat hollows with an angled faceplate to prevent ingress of water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare habitat hollows with an angled faceplate to prevent ingress of water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare habitat hollows with an angled faceplate to prevent ingress of water.

pcs.text: Remove internal wood from hollows and install faceplate and entrance holes according to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove internal wood from hollows and install faceplate and entrance holes according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove internal wood from hollows and install faceplate and entrance holes according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Install ground refuges using dimensions and materials specific to fauna habitat requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install ground refuges using dimensions and materials specific to fauna habitat requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install ground refuges using dimensions and materials specific to fauna habitat requirements.

pcs.text: Install nesting boxes to height and dimensions for target fauna species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install nesting boxes to height and dimensions for target fauna species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install nesting boxes to height and dimensions for target fauna species.

pcs.text: Remove unsafe habitat features for reinstallation into tree canopy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove unsafe habitat features for reinstallation into tree canopy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove unsafe habitat features for reinstallation into tree canopy.

pcs.text: Select, retain and position tree materials, from tree works, suitable for ground habitat, burrows and refuges
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, retain and position tree materials, from tree works, suitable for ground habitat, burrows and refuges?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, retain and position tree materials, from tree works, suitable for ground habitat, burrows and refuges.
